name: Wells Fargo Transaction
description: Structure of a Wells Fargo commercial banking transaction from the Account Transactions API.

fields.name: transactionType
fields.description: Payment type: ACH, WIRE, RTP, CHECK, or FED_NOW.

fields.name: debitCreditIndicator
fields.description: DEBIT or CREDIT to the account.

fields.name: postingDate
fields.description: Date the transaction posted to the account.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Transaction status: POSTED, PENDING, or RETURNED.

fields.name: referenceNumber
fields.description: Bank reference or NACHA trace number.
